title: 重播貓芽方塊 | CatBud: ReplayBlock
description: 任何人都能重播 CatBud 伺服器的方塊建造、破壞、更新紀錄｜Anyone can replay CatBud server's block placement, destruction, and update records.
body:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/KtPfJSHTG7I" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

## 中文
任何人都能重播 CatBud 伺服器的方塊建造、破壞、更新紀錄，拿來拍成各式各樣的建築縮時影片吧！
## 使用前必讀
**你必須使用種子碼 `657299810` 建立一般世界（世界類型：預設，且啟用結構生成）。** 若種子碼或世界設定不一致，地形將與伺服器不同，導致重播結果錯亂。
## 素材使用規範
使用此模組拍攝的任何素材，若非經由您本人在伺服器上建造的內容，請附上來源標註。例如：
> 來自 catbud.net 主世界 -100 -64 -100 ~ 100 320 100
## 尋找建築
如果您不想登入伺服器尋找建築，可使用 [CatBud 線上地圖](https://catbud.net/tool/map/) 查看全伺服器地表狀態來尋找建築座標。
## 快速開始
```
/replay area in -100 -64 -100 100 320 100
/replay time start 2024/01/01
/replay time end 2026/01/01
/replay play
```
## 指令一覽
| 指令 | 說明 |
|---|---|
| `/replay area in <x1> <y1> <z1> <x2> <y2> <z2>` | 新增包含區域 |
| `/replay area out <x1> <y1> <z1> <x2> <y2> <z2>` | 新增排除區域 |
| `/replay area clear` | 清除所有區域設定 |
| `/replay time start <yyyy/MM/dd>` | 設定起始日期 |
| `/replay time end <yyyy/MM/dd>` | 設定結束日期 |
| `/replay time clear` | 清除日期設定 |
| `/replay play` | 開始重播 |
| `/replay pause` / `/replay resume` | 暫停 / 繼續 |
| `/replay stop` | 停止重播 |
| `/replay speed <0.25-10000.0>` | 調整播放速度 |
| `/replay rewind <秒>` / `/replay forward <秒>` | 倒轉 / 快轉 |
| `/replay glow <on\|off>` | 開關方塊發光高亮 |
| `/replay sound <on\|off>` | 開關方塊音效 |
| `/replay bar <on\|off>` | 開關動作欄位進度顯示 |
| `/replay status` | 查看目前設定與播放狀態 |
| `/replay seed` | 顯示所需種子碼 |
| `/replay help` | 顯示指令說明 |
## 特色
- **多區域篩選** — 可同時設定多個包含與排除區域
- **發光高亮** — 變更的方塊以發光效果標示，播放完畢後自然淡出
- **雲端同步** — 自動下載缺少的重播資料，8 執行緒並行下載並即時回報進度
- **播放速度** — 0.25 倍慢放到 10000 倍快轉
- **環境抑制** — 重播期間自動抑制怪物生成與作物生長
- **多語系** — 繁體中文、簡體中文、英文、日文、韓文
## 環境需求
- Minecraft 1.21.11
- Fabric Loader ≥ 0.18.2
- Fabric API 0.141.3+1.21.11
- Java 21
---
## English
Replay every block placement, destruction, and update ever recorded on the CatBud server — and turn them into stunning timelapse videos!
## Before You Start
**You must create a normal world with seed `657299810` (world type: Default, with structure generation enabled).** If the seed or world settings don't match, terrain will differ from the server and replays will be inconsistent.
## Content Attribution
If you use footage captured with this mod, please credit the source unless the content was built by you on the server. For example:
> From catbud.net Overworld -100 -64 -100 ~ 100 320 100
## Finding Builds
If you don't want to log into the server to find builds, you can use the [CatBud Online Map](https://catbud.net/tool/map/) to browse the full server surface and locate building coordinates.
## Quick Start
```
/replay area in -100 -64 -100 100 320 100
/replay time start 2024/01/01
/replay time end 2026/01/01
/replay play
```
## Commands
| Command | Description |
|---|---|
| `/replay area in <x1> <y1> <z1> <x2> <y2> <z2>` | Add an include region |
| `/replay area out <x1> <y1> <z1> <x2> <y2> <z2>` | Add an exclude region |
| `/replay area clear` | Clear all area settings |
| `/replay time start <yyyy/MM/dd>` | Set start date |
| `/replay time end <yyyy/MM/dd>` | Set end date |
| `/replay time clear` | Clear date settings |
| `/replay play` | Start replay |
| `/replay pause` / `/replay resume` | Pause / Resume |
| `/replay stop` | Stop replay |
| `/replay speed <0.25-10000.0>` | Set playback speed |
| `/replay rewind <sec>` / `/replay forward <sec>` | Rewind / Fast-forward |
| `/replay glow <on\|off>` | Toggle block glow highlight |
| `/replay sound <on\|off>` | Toggle block sound effects |
| `/replay bar <on\|off>` | Toggle action bar progress |
| `/replay status` | View current settings and playback state |
| `/replay seed` | Show required world seed |
| `/replay help` | Show command help |
## Features
- **Multi-region filtering** — Set multiple include and exclude regions simultaneously
- **Glow highlight** — Changed blocks are highlighted with a glowing effect that fades out naturally
- **Cloud sync** — Automatically downloads missing replay data with 8 parallel threads and real-time progress reports
- **Playback speed** — From 0.25x slow-motion to 10000x fast-forward
- **Environment suppression** — Mob spawning and crop growth are suppressed during replay
- **Localization** — Traditional Chinese, Simplified Chinese, English, Japanese, Korean
## Requirements
- Minecraft 1.21.11
- Fabric Loader ≥ 0.18.2
- Fabric API 0.141.3+1.21.11
- Java 21
